products.name: ZeroDB
products.description: Unified data platform for AI agents — vector storage, NoSQL tables, file storage (S3-compatible), event streaming, agent memory, and dedicated PostgreSQL instances.

products.name: ZeroMemory
products.description: Multi-tier cognitive memory system for AI agents — working memory, episodic memory, semantic memory with automatic consolidation, decay scoring, reflection, entity profiles, and Context Graph (GraphRAG).

products.name: Agent Cloud
products.description: Managed infrastructure for deploying and running AI agents at scale — agent registry, A2A networking, OAuth 2.1, billing, credential vault, dedicated deployments, inference routing, observability.

products.name: AI Kit
products.description: 14-package framework-agnostic UI toolkit for building AI-powered interfaces — components, hooks, React integration, A2UI (agent-to-UI), observability, and safety modules.

products.name: Cody CLI
products.description: AI-powered coding assistant CLI with ZeroDB memory, MCP integration, hooks, sandboxing, and web sessions.

products.name: Chat Completions API
products.description: OpenAI-compatible chat completions API with tiered provider routing, tool calling support, and auto-fallback on errors.

products.name: Live Streaming
products.description: Live streaming platform with WebSocket chat, categories, analytics, VOD recording via Cloudflare Stream.

products.name: Multimodal Generation
products.description: Image generation (fal.ai), video creation (Runway), and speech synthesis (ElevenLabs) via unified /media namespace.

products.name: Embeddings API
products.description: Free embedding generation using BAAI BGE models via DigitalOcean inference.

products.name: Echo Developer Program
products.description: Revenue sharing platform for developers building apps with AINative APIs — set markup (0-40%), earn from customer usage, payouts via Stripe Connect.

products.name: OpenCap Stack
products.description: Open-source cap table management — stakeholders, share classes, SAFEs, equity plans, valuations, documents, dilution analysis, waterfall modeling.

products.name: ZeroInvoice
products.description: Invoice management with Stripe and QuickBooks integration.

products.name: ZeroCommerce
products.description: E-commerce API with product templating and Stripe checkout.

products.name: ZeroPipeline
products.description: CRM and deal pipeline management.

products.name: Browser Agent
products.description: Automated browser workflows — extraction, validation, memory enrichment, batch processing.

products.name: Content Workflow
products.description: AI personas, content scheduling, and social media publishing.

products.name: AX Audit
products.description: Agent Accessibility (AX) scoring — measures how well a website supports AI agents operating autonomously.

products.name: Community Platform
products.description: Community events, social connections, posts, comments, groups, trending content.

products.name: MCP Hosting
products.description: Hosted MCP server infrastructure — multi-tenant Kubernetes, Redis sessions, monitoring, billing integration.

products.name: Sequential Thinking
products.description: Structured reasoning chains stored as persistent plan artifacts in ZeroDB.

products.name: Agent402
products.description: Stablecoin payments for AI agent-to-agent commerce.

products.name: QNN API
products.description: Quantum Neural Network API — experimental quantum computing interface.

architecture.inference: Tiered routing: Cerebras -> Meta -> NIM (free), DO -> NIM -> Meta (paid)
constraints: API handlers: validate input, call service layer, return response. No business logic.
Service layer: all business logic. No direct DB writes outside service layer.
Repository/DB: all access via SQLAlchemy session. No raw SQL in endpoints.
Memory/Context: ZeroDB mandatory. No generic memory MCPs, no Supabase.
Secrets: never in code. Railway env vars or .env only.
